_source: Kurczak & Fish, Art & Science of Vedic Astrology — Vol I Ch.10 'Planetary Yogas' + Vol II Ch.7 'Additional Named Yogas'.
_note: Yoga = a combination (of planets / sign / house) that concentrates a life-theme. These are the TIER-2 knot detectors — cross-cutting patterns above the single life-area. Each record: condition (deterministically checkable), result, type, and caveats. NOTE the universal rules below — a yoga only FIRES in the dasha of its planets, and is far stronger when it repeats from Lagna, Chandra (Moon) lagna, Sun lagna, or the Navamsha.

universalRules.judgeFromMultipleLagnas: Judge every yoga from the Ascendant AND the Moon-ascendant (Chandra lagna) AND Sun lagna. A yoga present from more than one becomes much more influential; present also in the Navamsha → manifests with great strength.
universalRules.dashaGate: The single most common reason a yoga fails to deliver: the dasha/bhukti of the planets forming it never runs during the relevant life period. A yoga is LATENT until its planets' period activates it.
universalRules.neechaBhanga: A debilitated (fallen) planet associated with an exalted planet has its debility cancelled (neecha bhanga) and can act as if exalted.
universalRules.dispositorStrength: An exalted planet in a kendra/trine gives full yoga effect only if its dispositor (ruler of the sign it sits in) is strong. A planet in its OWN sign is its own dispositor — strong in body and soul, sometimes better than exaltation.
universalRules.noYogaDominates: No yoga completely dominates a chart; every other factor modifies it. Never give an unmodified textbook reading of a yoga.

yogas.name: Dharma Karma Adhipati
yogas.condition: Lord of the 5th or 9th (trine/dharma) conjoins, aspects, or has sambandha with the lord of the 1st, 4th, 7th or 10th (angle/karma).
yogas.result: Wealth, success and prominence in one's field of activity.
yogas.note: RAJA YOGA KARAKA: for Taurus, Cancer, Leo, Libra, Capricorn or Aquarius ascendants a single planet rules both an angle and a trine — it alone gives very desirable results.

yogas.name: Ruchaka (Pancha Mahapurusha — Mars)
yogas.condition: Mars in its own or exaltation sign AND in a kendra (angle) or trine.
yogas.result: Fearless, bold, victorious in conflict; abundant energy.

yogas.name: Bhadra (Pancha Mahapurusha — Mercury)
yogas.condition: Mercury in its own or exaltation sign AND in a kendra or trine.
yogas.result: Learned and intelligent.

yogas.name: Hansa (Pancha Mahapurusha — Jupiter)
yogas.condition: Jupiter in its own or exaltation sign AND in a kendra or trine.
yogas.result: Fortunate in life, religious and spiritually inclined.

yogas.name: Malavya (Pancha Mahapurusha — Venus)
yogas.condition: Venus in its own or exaltation sign AND in a kendra or trine.
yogas.result: Wealthy, self-indulgent, fond of luxury; FORTUNATE IN LOVE AND MARRIAGE.

yogas.name: Shasha (Pancha Mahapurusha — Saturn)
yogas.condition: Saturn in its own or exaltation sign AND in a kendra or trine.
yogas.result: Strong and disciplined; attains positions of authority.

yogas.name: Gaja Keshari
yogas.condition: Jupiter in a kendra (1/4/7/10) FROM THE MOON, not debilitated or combust, conjunct/aspected by a benefic.
yogas.result: Good fortune, intelligence, a noble virtuous nature, happiness, good education.
yogas.note: Also cancels Kemadruma. Weigh Moon's paksha bala and the houses both own.

yogas.name: Sakata / Shataka
yogas.condition: Moon in the 6th, 8th or 12th house FROM JUPITER.
yogas.result: Alternating cycles of prosperity and adversity; misfortune, sorrow. Reverse of Gaja Keshari.
yogas.note: NOT formed if the Moon is in an angle to the Ascendant.

yogas.name: Kemadruma
yogas.condition: No planets (excluding Sun and the Nodes) in the houses on EITHER side of the Moon (2nd and 12th from Moon both empty).
yogas.result: Loneliness, a poor or difficult life.
yogas.note: Neutralized if the Moon is in a kendra/trine, conjunct another planet, or forms Gaja Keshari.

yogas.name: Sunapha
yogas.condition: One or more planets (other than the Sun) in the 2nd house FROM THE MOON.
yogas.result: Increase in wealth, comfort, happiness, good reputation (best with natural benefics).

yogas.name: Anapha
yogas.condition: One or more planets (other than the Sun) in the 12th house FROM THE MOON.
yogas.result: As Sunapha — wealth, comfort, reputation.

yogas.name: Durudhara
yogas.condition: Planets other than the Sun in BOTH the 2nd and 12th from the Moon.
yogas.result: Recognition through speech, learning and virtue; wealth and comfort. Stronger than Sunapha/Anapha.
yogas.note: Spoiled if only malefics (Mars/Saturn) involved, or close association of the Nodes or Sun.

yogas.name: Shubha Kartari
yogas.condition: Benefic planets occupy the 2nd and 12th houses from the Ascendant.
yogas.result: Good health and the ability to accumulate wealth.

yogas.name: Papa Kartari
yogas.condition: Malefic planets (not the Nodes) occupy the 2nd and 12th houses from the Ascendant.
yogas.result: Poor health and financial difficulties (reverses Shubha Kartari).

yogas.name: Ati Vasuman
yogas.condition: All three benefics (Mercury, Venus, Jupiter) in upachaya houses (3/6/10/11) from the Ascendant.
yogas.result: Abundance and prosperity.

yogas.name: Amala
yogas.condition: A natural benefic occupying the 10th house from the Ascendant and/or the Moon.
yogas.result: Kind, benevolent; a career helping/serving the public; well thought of; prospers. (Malefic there → recognition kept at others' expense.)

yogas.name: Parivartana
yogas.condition: Mutual reception: planet A in planet B's sign and planet B in planet A's sign.
yogas.result: Both planets affect each other as if conjunct/aspecting; favourability depends on the two planets' nature.

yogas.name: Srik
yogas.condition: Only natural benefics in the angular (kendra) houses.
yogas.result: Abundance, good fortune, a comfortable life.

yogas.name: Sarpa
yogas.condition: Only natural malefics in the angular houses.
yogas.result: A difficult and troublesome life.

yogas.name: Maha Bhagya
yogas.condition: MAN: daytime birth with Ascendant, Sun and Moon in odd (fire/air) signs. WOMAN: night birth with Ascendant, Sun and Moon in even (earth/water) signs.
yogas.result: Very fortunate — all factors aligned to the native's gender.

yogas.name: Kala Sarpa
yogas.condition: All seven planets on one side of the Rahu-Ketu axis. Anuloma = planets moving toward Rahu; Viloma = toward Ketu.
yogas.result: Difficulty and hardship; strong energization of the psychic nature; can obstruct other positive yogas.
yogas.note: Anuloma → Rahu's house is disrupted; Viloma → Ketu's house is the key (spiritual focus / contradictions). Improved if the nodes' dispositors are well placed and the nodes in compatible signs (Virgo-Pisces, Taurus-Scorpio).

yogas.name: Vashi
yogas.condition: Planets (other than the Moon) in the 12th house FROM THE SUN.
yogas.result: Increase in wealth and status (with benefics; reversed with malefics).

yogas.name: Veshi
yogas.condition: Planets (other than the Moon) in the 2nd house FROM THE SUN.
yogas.result: Increase in wealth and status (with benefics; reversed with malefics).

yogas.name: Ubhayachari
yogas.condition: Planets in BOTH the 2nd and 12th from the Sun.
yogas.result: The best of the three solar yogas for wealth and status.

yogas.name: Buddhaditya
yogas.condition: Sun and Mercury in the same sign; effective when Mercury is at higher longitude and at least 8° past combustion, and Sun/Mercury own or occupy the 1st/5th (or the sign sits in 1/5/7/11).
yogas.result: Good mental powers. (Combustion does not destroy intellect but hampers its expression.)

yogas.name: Chandra-Mangala
yogas.condition: Moon and Mars in the same sign or mutual aspect (or exchange of signs); best conjunct in the 9th/10th/11th with a strong Moon.
yogas.result: Benefits financial status; in a man's chart gains through females or Moon-ruled occupations. Without a Jupiter aspect the means may be fraudulent.

yogas.name: Lakshmi (1)
yogas.condition: The 9th lord and Venus both in own/exaltation sign in kendra/trine, OR Venus in the 9th in own/exaltation.
yogas.result: Great prosperity (Lakshmi = goddess of wealth).

yogas.name: Lakshmi (2)
yogas.condition: Moon and Mars in the same sign with the Moon at greater longitude than Mars.
yogas.result: Good for wealth.

yogas.name: Pushkala
yogas.condition: Lord of the Moon's sign conjoins the Ascendant lord in a kendra, while a benefic aspects the Ascendant (both lords in strong signs).
yogas.result: Prosperity, as the Lakshmi yogas.

yogas.name: Mangala
yogas.condition: All planets in kendras (1/4/7/10).
yogas.result: Good fortune and attainment of prominence.

yogas.name: Madhya
yogas.condition: All planets in panaphara houses (2/5/8/11).
yogas.result: Only moderate fortune; life of ups and downs.

yogas.name: Kleeva
yogas.condition: All planets in apoklima houses (3/6/9/12).
yogas.result: Lack of wealth, comforts and attainment ('impotent' = powerless).

yogas.name: Vipreet
yogas.condition: Malefic planets occupy the trik/dusthana houses (6/8/12).
yogas.result: Their malefic influence is nullified or considerably moderated.

yogas.name: Adhi
yogas.condition: Benefic planets occupy the 6th, 7th and 8th houses from the Moon or the Ascendant.
yogas.result: Health, abundance, happiness, good character, a polite and trustworthy nature.

yogas.name: Ashubha-Mangala
yogas.condition: All benefic planets occupy the 6th, 8th or 12th houses.
yogas.result: Very unfortunate — benefics rendered powerless.

yogas.name: Saraswati
yogas.condition: Venus, Jupiter and Mercury in kendra/trine houses or the 2nd (Jupiter in exaltation/own/friend's sign).
yogas.result: A learned/scholarly person, skilled writer, lecturer or orator; may bestow mathematical ability.

yogas.name: Vasumat
yogas.condition: Benefic planets in upachaya houses (3/6/10/11) from the Ascendant or Moon.
yogas.result: Abundance (fewer benefics → weaker; malefics there do not spoil it).

yogas.name: Dur
yogas.condition: Lords of 6/8/12 in kendra/trine while lords of 1/4/9/10 are weak/combust in 6/8/12.
yogas.result: General difficulties, particularly with status and career. REVERSED (trik lords weak, good-house lords strong) → increased fortune, happiness, wealth.

yogas.name: Parvati
yogas.condition: Benefics in angular houses with the 7th and 8th empty or occupied by benefics.
yogas.result: All-round benefits — wealth, learning, status, a charitable nature.

yogas.name: Kulavardhana
yogas.condition: All seven planets in the 5th house from the Ascendant, Moon and Sun.
yogas.result: Abundance of children and grandchildren; strong, influential family line.

yogas.name: Arishta Bhanga
yogas.condition: Jupiter in an angular or trinal house, well placed by sign (exalt/own/friend).
yogas.result: Power to overcome the evils and afflictions indicated elsewhere in the chart.

yogas.name: Shri Kantha (Pravrajya)
yogas.condition: Sun, Moon and Ascendant lord all in angles/trines, in exaltation/own/friendly signs.
yogas.result: Highly religious, magnanimous; a devotee of the divine.
yogas.note: Pravrajya (renunciation) family also includes: Moon in a Mars/Saturn sign in Navamsha aspected by Saturn → sanyasi; 4+ planets in one house devoid of affliction (esp. involving the 10th lord in a kendra/trine) → yogi who attains enlightenment.
